hooks.command: if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q '\.env\|.pem\|.key\|.crt\|.p12'; then echo 'BLOCK: Sensitive file — edit manually'; exit 1; fi
if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'Cargo\.lock'; then echo 'BLOCK: Cargo.lock is auto-generated — modify Cargo.toml instead'; exit 1; fi

FILE_PATH=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -o '"file_path":"[^"]*"' | head -1 | cut -d'"' -f4); if echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -q '\.rs$'; then cd /Users/tindang/workspaces/tind-repo/moon && cargo fmt --check 2>&1 | head -10; fi
if echo "$TOOL_RESULT" | grep -q 'unsafe'; then echo 'WARNING: unsafe block detected — ensure // SAFETY: comment is present'; fi
